creator: raimeetravel
caption:
My Tanzania safari trip costs less than you might think! This was our 10-day itinerary around Tanzania + how you can go on an amazing safari like this for less than $5k! We stayed at mostly luxury resorts too & the price included a ton of food and transport as well! 

💸 The total for this exact trip is $4,885 this year! If you want more info about it comment SHIRI and I’ll send you the link to the info page! 

@amanda_wanders x @shiri_adventures were the best guides!

#safari #tanzania #tanzaniatravel #greatmigration #safaritrip

transcription.text: I spent 10 days around Tanzania on safari for less than $5,000, so here's everywhere we went and how you can do this trip too. After flying into Mount Kilimanjaro, you'll start your trip in Terengira National Park. Most people skip this and go straight to Serengeti, which is a huge mistake because this has the largest elephant population in Northern Tanzania. We saw hundreds of them. You'll spend the first two days here and then head to Lake Manyara. Then you'll drive up to Ngorongoro Crater, and it is a collapsed volcano that's become this self-contained ecosystem. You'll find lions, elephants, rhinos, zebras, flamingos. Then day six through eight, it's time for the Serengeti. The hype is honestly very justified. We were there during migration season and we watched a million wildebeests moving across the plains. After all that safari time, a relaxing beach vibe is exactly what you need. Trust me, so you're gonna fly over to Zanzibar. There's a historical city center and beautiful beaches. And now for the money part. How did I do this for less than $5,000? I went on a group trip, which is genuinely the best way to save on a safari. Let me know if you want the info about the one that I did. Shiri Adventures was the company we used. So even if you're not doing a group trip, check them out. Okay, if you've been thinking about safari, this is your sign. It doesn't have to be crazy expensive and it's one of the best trips you'll ever take.
